problem id: 1f1292d6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND SHR(5)) XOR SHL(3)

examples:
  10110011 -> 10011001
  11100100 -> 00100110
  00010101 -> 10101000
  10110100 -> 10100001
  11011110 -> 11110100
  10001100 -> 01100000
  00011101 -> 11101000
  00100110 -> 00110000
  11001111 -> 01111100
  10111010 -> 11010001

query: 01010001
predicted answer: 10001000
